message:
refactor: move agent/, llm/, frontmatter/ out of internal/ for public API (GAP-1.01)

Every import path changes from primeradiant.com/serf/internal/... to
primeradiant.com/serf/... so external Go modules can now import the
serf SDK packages directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 	"strings"

-	"primeradiant.com/serf/internal/llm"
+	"primeradiant.com/serf/llm"
 )
